title: Legousia leptocarpa
intro: Legousia leptocarpa, also known as small blue legousia, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to Europe. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and improve overall well-being. Bioactive constituents of Legousia leptocarpa include saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is typically used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects.
